description: This proposal manually bypasses a broken `evolve_propose` function to fix a critical bug in `validate_skill_syntax`. The validation function was using an incorrect API to call `forge_validate`, causing a crash that prevented any proposals from being made. This change corrects the API call, unblocking the evolution loop and ensuring pre-proposal syntax validation works as intended.
diff_summary: Replaced the incorrect `kernel.skills` call with the correct `kernel.registry['forge_validate']` call in `skills/meta-evolution/functions/validate.py`.
